title: SENIOR LONELINESS LINE - 211info
text: LINES FOR LIFE SENIOR LONELINESS LINE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides support for individuals experiencing loneliness, isolation, depression, or anxiety. Provides active listening, emotional and grief support, information and referrals, and suicide and crisis intervention. 5100 SW Macadam Avenue Suite 400 Portland, OR 97239 Eligibility: Age 55 and older Hours: 7 days per week 5:30am-11:30pm Email (800) 282-7035 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Hotline (800) 282-7035 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: General Crisis Intervention Hotlines * Older Adults Mental Health Crisis Lines * Older Adults Suicide Prevention Hotlines * Older Adults Talklines/Warmlines * Older Adults Other Services Offered At This Location: COUNSELING SETTINGS - CONSTRUCTION CARELINE MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - 988 SUICIDE AND CRISIS LIFELINE MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - MILITARY HELPLINE MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - YOUTHLINE SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - ALCOHOL AND DRUG HELPLINE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LINES FOR LIFE
